message:
fix: defer FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS restore to handle tx rollback (bd-zzji)

SET FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS is session-level in MySQL/Dolt and is not undone
by transaction rollback. If any operation between disable and re-enable
fails, the pooled connection is returned with FK checks still disabled.
Add a defer to guarantee re-enablement on all error paths.

Executed-By: beads/polecats/topaz
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
